request.description:
gets upload url to which replays can be put

Example how to get the current UTC timezone offset required by the api:

const getUtcOffset = () => -(new Date().getTimezoneOffset() / 60;

Once you have sent the request, you will get a upload url.

You will need to send a PUT request to that url with the replay binary as the body/payload.

Once you have done that you could use the trackingId returned by the initial response for polling (Upload Status API), until the replay has been parsed, it will then show up the recent matches api.
